message:
test(time): Add deadline, driver handle, and timer wheel tests (bd-rpsc)

Deadline (131 lines added):
- with_deadline_sets_deadline_on_scope_without_one
- with_deadline_preserves_tighter_existing_deadline
- with_deadline_tightens_when_new_is_earlier
- with_timeout_computes_absolute_deadline (now + duration)
- with_timeout_respects_existing_tighter_deadline
- with_deadline_zero_deadline

Timer driver handle (116 lines added):
- Tests for TimerDriverHandle API exercising registration, expiry
  checking, and cancellation through the driver interface

Timer wheel (117 lines added):
- Tests for timer wheel slot management, tick advancement, and
  deadline resolution accuracy

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
